creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to VVD from comment #9)
I am not sure to whom you asked the question. But I would like to say that I couldn't find any easy way to submit patches as they use a private git repo and is used by the employees of linphone only. But if anyone finds a way to submit patches let me know. I think I have dozens of patches on their ecosystem to submit.
